metadata.description: Community-driven marketplace for Claude Code plugins featuring git automation and commit management

plugins.name: code-simplifier
plugins.description: Simplify and refine code for clarity, consistency, and maintainability. Requires pr-review-toolkit plugin.

plugins.name: command-help-skill
plugins.description: Help claude understand, discover, and execute slash commands when accidentally sent as a message.

plugins.name: commit-command
plugins.description: Automate git commits with AI-generated messages that match your repository's commit style and conventions

plugins.name: commit-skill
plugins.description: Intelligent skill that enables Claude to automatically analyze git changes and create well-formatted commits during development

plugins.name: correct-behavior
plugins.description: Command to correct AI behavior mistakes and update rules to prevent recurrence

plugins.name: create-command
plugins.description: Create and maintain Claude Code slash commands with guided assistance

plugins.name: data-serialization
plugins.description: Data format conversion and querying utilities. Supports YAML, JSON, TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation), and XML/HTML transformations with special handling for Playwright accessibility snapshots. TOON provides 30-60% token reduction vs JSON for LLM contexts.

plugins.name: git-spice
plugins.description: Skill for managing stacked Git branches with git-spice (gs) CLI tool

plugins.name: github-auth-skill
plugins.description: Skill for authenticating with GitHub using device authorization flow

plugins.name: linear-mcp-sync
plugins.description: Installs Linear MCP and adds hooks for safe ticket updates with hash validation to prevent stale overwrites

plugins.name: memory-manager
plugins.description: Intelligent memory management for CLAUDE.md files. Automatically detects and stores user preferences, rules, and instructions with smart scope detection and hierarchical organization.

plugins.name: og-image
plugins.description: Generate OpenGraph images for Nuxt/Vue pages using HTML templates and html2png.dev API

plugins.name: plugin-management
plugins.description: Skill for installing, updating, and managing Claude Code plugins — including what requires a restart and what hot-reloads.

plugins.name: product-development-and-sdlc
plugins.description: Iterative spec and user story writing with structured SDLC workflows. Guides incremental specification development through research, review, and refinement cycles.

plugins.name: review-changes
plugins.description: Review code changes with detailed feedback on quality, security, performance, and maintainability

plugins.name: safety-evaluation-prompt
plugins.description: Pre-tool-call safety evaluation using prompt-style hooks for inline AI evaluation

plugins.name: safety-evaluation-script
plugins.description: Pre-tool-call safety evaluation using Claude CLI (haiku) with script-style hooks

plugins.name: scm-utils
plugins.description: Source control management utilities for improving interactions with branches and PRs, both locally and in CI environments

plugins.name: self-terminate
plugins.description: Allows Claude to gracefully terminate itself using SIGINT

plugins.name: skill-required
plugins.description: Enforces that specified skills are loaded before certain tools can be used. Tracks skill reads via PostToolUse and blocks tool use via PreToolUse if the required skill hasn't been recently loaded.

plugins.name: skills-maintenance
plugins.description: Agent skill for maintaining, updating, and improving existing Claude Code skills

plugins.name: statusline
plugins.description: Configurable status line for Claude Code showing session info, project context, and git status

plugins.name: statusline-iterm
plugins.description: Status line for Claude Code with iTerm2 badge integration - shows session info, project context, git status, and updates iTerm2 badge

plugins.name: sync-settings
plugins.description: Automatically sync and merge local Claude Code settings, commands, and files using configurable rules in syncconfig.yaml

plugins.name: task-parallelization
plugins.description: Intelligent skill that helps Claude parallelize Task tool calls when working on repetitive or batch operations, optimizing throughput based on task complexity

plugins.name: tmux-subagent
plugins.description: Launch independent Claude sub-agents in tmux sessions with custom configurations, tool restrictions, and iTerm integration

plugins.name: todo-plus-plus
plugins.description: Enforces commit-on-complete for tasks and reminds about ephemeral session awareness

plugins.name: todo-sync
plugins.description: Automatically syncs todos and plans from ~/.claude/ to the current project's .claude/ directory
